campaignLedger.title: Campaign Ledger Entry
campaignLedger.description: Represents a single campaign performance row in the ledger.

offerId.description: The unique ID for the offer.

offerName.description: The human-readable name for the offer.

creativeImage.description: Base64 string of the newsletter/creative screenshot.

sourceData.description: The green/blue active box in Mixing Panel (Source Segment).

targetMix.description: The target Mixing List dropdown name.

dataType.description: The data type: Open, Click, or Unsub.

createdDate.description: The execution date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was actually created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

timestamp_created.description: Historical creation timestamp for sorting (YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss).

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this record.

/ledger/{entryId}.description: Collection of all campaign ledger entries.
